#reels #trending #foryou #relatable #student
Ok
@shrvni_0720 ok

STEP 1

Go to:

https://ollama.com/download

Download Ollama for Windows.

Install it normally.

After installation, open Command Prompt or terminal.

STEP 2: Download and run ollama 3.2 model

Run this command:

ollama run llama3.2:3b

The first time, it will download the model 

Its about 2 gb
@defnotarchita X’s p

Bro I don’t know😭😭see pin comment
@_xladybug gotcha🫡

Ultimate guide: Paper se ek din phle jake apna pc select krlo. Jis pe next day tumhe paper dena ha lab exam. And make sure next day you arrive at least 30 minutes early to make the mehnat worth it. Open pc and open cmd and use this command "irm https://ollama.com/install.ps1 | iex" When installation done. Use this command to pull local offline model you want yo use offline. Use this "
ollama run llama3" When model is downloaded then you can use it offline. Similarly you can pull any model by this command "ollama run llama3" Just replace llama3 with the model name listed on ollama. And make sure to pull only 4 to 7 billion parameters model as university and school has a limited hardware configurations
